#!/usr/bin/env python3
import http.server
import socketserver
import threading
import time

class Handler(http.server.BaseHTTPRequestHandler):
    def do_GET(self):
        print(f'[INCOMING] GET {self.path}', flush=True)
        for k, v in self.headers.items():
            print(f'  {k}: {v}', flush=True)
        self.send_response(200)
        self.send_header('Content-Type', 'text/html')
        self.end_headers()
        self.wfile.write(b'<html><body>Hello from test server</body></html>')
    def log_message(self, format, *args):
        pass

httpd = socketserver.TCPServer(('0.0.0.0', 8889), Handler)
print('Server started on port 8889', flush=True)

# Run in background for 10 seconds
t = threading.Thread(target=httpd.serve_forever)
t.daemon = True
t.start()
time.sleep(15)
print('Timeout', flush=True)
EOF

#!/usr/bin/env python3
import http.server
import socketserver
import threading
import time
import sys
import io

log = []

class Handler(http.server.BaseHTTPRequestHandler):
    def do_GET(self):
        entry = f'GET {self.path}'
        for k, v in self.headers.items():
            entry += f'\n  {k}: {v}'
        log.append(entry)
        print(f'[{time.strftime("%H:%M:%S")}] Received: GET {self.path}', file=sys.stderr, flush=True)
        self.send_response(200)
        self.send_header('Content-Type', 'text/html')
        self.end_headers()
        self.wfile.write(b'<html><body><script>alert(1)</script></body></html>')
    def log_message(self, format, *args):
        pass

server = socketserver.TCPServer(('0.0.0.0', 7777), Handler)
print("Listening on 7777", file=sys.stderr, flush=True)

# Serve for 30 seconds
def serve():
    server.serve_forever()

t = threading.Thread(target=serve, daemon=True)
t.start()

# Keep server alive
for i in range(30):
    time.sleep(1)
    if i % 5 == 0:
        print(f"[{i}s] Requests so far: {len(log)}", file=sys.stderr, flush=True)

server.shutdown()
print(f"Total requests: {len(log)}", flush=True)
for entry in log:
    print(entry, flush=True)

            content = r.read().decode('utf-8', errors='replace')[:200]
            print(f'[{code}] /{path}: {repr(content[:100])}')
    except urllib.error.HTTPError as e:
        if e.code != 404:
            print(f'[{e.code}] /{path}')
    except Exception as e:
